Name: FMovieSceneTrackCompilationParams
Description: Movie scene compilation parameters. Serialized items contribute to a compiled template's cached hash

Variables.Name: bForEditorPreview
Variables.Description: Whether we're generating for an editor preview, or for efficient runtime evaluation

Variables.Name: bDuringBlueprintCompile
Variables.Description: Whether we're generating during a blueprint compile. As such, UObject types may not have been fully loaded.
